testcase.name: testExecuteParsesContentArray
testExecuteWithHttpError
testcase.system-out: 07:24:05.370 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.tool.mcp.McpToolAdapter -- Created MCP tool adapter: server_error_tool -> http://localhost:8765/mcp 07:24:05.370 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.tool.mcp.McpToolAdapter -- Executing MCP tool: server_error_tool with arguments: {} 07:24:05.371 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.tool.mcp.McpToolAdapter -- MCP request: testcase.name: testExecuteWithEmptyArguments
testExecuteSendsFormattedRequest
testExecuteWithBypass
testExecuteWithoutAuth
testExecuteWithSingleContent
testExecuteWithComplexArguments
testExecuteIncludesToolName
testExecuteWithNullArguments
testExecuteWithError
